SingleBlastoFET Offline

Center-specific decision support for non-PGT single blastocyst frozen-thawed embryo transfer
This standalone HTML contains aggregate group-level outcomes and model-derived summaries. No patient-level records are included. It is an adjunctive evidence display, not medical advice.

Selected-group adjusted regression

ComparisonReferenceModel NAdjusted OR95% CIP
GroupNObserved LBR95% CIAdjusted LBRClinical pregnancyMiscarriageEvidence

Evidence levels: High n >= 100; Moderate n >= 50; Low n >= 30; Very low n < 30.

The adjusted group model is used for sufficiently represented groups. The component model provides model-aided estimates for sparse groups.

Limitations include retrospective single-center data, no external validation, moderate discrimination, and reliance on routinely recorded morphology rather than embryo images or genetic testing.
